query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.email,
  u.name,
  u.role,
  u.tenant_id,
  t.company_name AS tenant_name,
  t.slug AS tenant_slug,
  CASE WHEN u.password_hash IS NULL OR u.password_hash = '' THEN 'MISSING' ELSE 'SET' END AS password_status,
  LEFT(u.password_hash, 10) AS hash_prefix
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN tenants t ON u.tenant_id = t.id
WHERE u.email IN (
  'dispatch@acmehvac.com',
  'tech@acmehvac.com',
  'admin@plumbpro.com',
  'admin@nvc360.com'
)
ORDER BY u.email;
